case_title: O'BRIEN, WILLIAM VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,DEPT./PUBLIC WORKS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,DEPT./PUBLIC WORKS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY O'BRIEN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,DEPT./PUBLIC WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,DEPT./PUBLIC WORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
